lessons.title: Definition
lessons.content:
## Definition

Number of trials until the first success.

### Key Points

- Study this topic carefully with the interactive examples.
- Practice related questions in the practice section.
- Use the step-by-step solutions when you get stuck.

### Formula

For this topic, refer to the Formula Sheet in the Tools section.

lessons.title: Geometric PMF
lessons.content:
## Geometric PMF

P(X=x) = p(1-p)^(x-1) for x = 1, 2, 3, ...

### Key Points

- Study this topic carefully with the interactive examples.
- Practice related questions in the practice section.
- Use the step-by-step solutions when you get stuck.

### Formula

For this topic, refer to the Formula Sheet in the Tools section.

lessons.title: Mean and Variance
lessons.content:
## Mean and Variance

μ = 1/p, σ² = (1-p)/p².

### Key Points

- Study this topic carefully with the interactive examples.
- Practice related questions in the practice section.
- Use the step-by-step solutions when you get stuck.

### Formula

For this topic, refer to the Formula Sheet in the Tools section.
